## Checklist

- [ ] `bun test` passes (if applicable)
- [ ] User-facing strings use `useTranslation()` (both `en.json` and `fr.json` updated)
- [ ] No hardcoded colors (using semantic CSS variables or Tailwind tokens)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
